fixed_source: m=gameoflife;i=io:std.io;i=s:std.str;f=neighbors(x:$i64;y:$i64;grid:$str;w:$i64;h:$i64):$i64{let count=mut.0;lp(let dy=0-1;dy<=1;dy=dy+1){lp(let dx=0-1;dx<=1;dx=dx+1){if(dx=0){if(dy=0){}el{let gx=x+dx;let gy=y+dy;if(gx>=0){if(gx<w){if(gy>=0){if(gy<h){let idx=gy*w+gx;let ch=s.slice(grid;idx;idx+1);if(ch="*"){count=count+1}}}}}}}el{let gx=x+dx;let gy=y+dy;if(gx>=0){if(gx<w){if(gy>=0){if(gy<h){let idx=gy*w+gx;let ch=s.slice(grid;idx;idx+1);if(ch="*"){count=count+1}}}}}}}};<count};f=step(grid:$str;w:$i64;h:$i64):$str{let res=mut."";lp(let y=0;y<h;y=y+1){lp(let x=0;x<w;x=x+1){let idx=y*w+x;let ch=s.slice(grid;idx;idx+1);let n=neighbors(x;y;grid;w;h);let alive=mut.0;if(ch="*"){alive=1};if(alive=1){if(n<2){res=res+"."}el{if(n>3){res=res+"."}el{res=res+"*"}}}el{if(n=3){res=res+"*"}el{res=res+"."}}}};<res};f=main():$i64{let g0=mut."";let w=mut.0;let h=mut.0;let line=mut.io.readln();lp(s.len(line)>0){let t=s.trim(line);if(s.len(t)>0){w=s.len(t);g0=g0+t;h=h+1};line=io.readln()};let g1=step(g0;w;h);if(g1=g0){io.println("Stable");<0};let g2=step(g1;w;h);if(g2=g0){io.println("Oscillator period 2");<0};let prev=mut.g2;let cur=mut.g2;let gen=mut.2;let found=mut.0;lp(gen<100){let nxt=step(cur;w;h);if(nxt=cur){io.println("Stable");found=1;gen=100}el{if(nxt=prev){io.println("Oscillator period 2");found=1;gen=100}el{prev=cur;cur=nxt;gen=gen+1}}};if(found=0){io.println("Chaotic")};<0}
